title: West Bengal polls: Justice TS Sivagnanam resigns from SIR appellate tribunal
description: Days after the assembly elections concluded in West Bengal, former Calcutta High Court Chief Justice TS Sivagnanam has resigned from Appellate Tribunal tasked to hear appeals arising out of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in the State.Justice Sivagnanam was among the 19 retired judges notified as appellate tribunals by the Election Commission of India (ECI) following directions of the Supreme Court in March.According to The Indian Express, Justice Sivagnanam has now resig
